creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, with minor modifications [1], thank you. 

[1] Modifications: 
- replaced 'bin' user in patch with $(BINOWN) 
- replaced 'bin' group in patch with $(BINGRP) 
- passed BINOWN="${BINOWN}" BINGRP="${BINGRP}" to MAKE_ENV 
- bumped PORTREVISION
